   $$
   \log_{10}(2^n) > \log_{10}(10^8)

   n \cdot \log_{10}(2) > 8
   $$

2. **Solve for $ n $**:  
   $$
   n > \frac{8}{\log_{10}(2)}
   $$
   Using $ \log_{10}(2) \approx 0.3010 $:  
   $$
   n > \frac{8}{0.3010} \approx 26.57
   $$

3. **Determine the smallest integer $ n $**:
